Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: bags (costume accessories) [300198926], costume accessories carried [300209275], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Flat pouches of fabric with a bound slit in the outer surface, which is worn suspended from ties which fasten around the waist.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Bolsa chata de material con una abertura en la superficie exterior; se lleva suspendida de lazos que se sujetan alrededor de la cintura.
Platte buidels van stof met een omzoomde split aan de buitenkant, die worden gedragen hangend aan banden rond de taille.
Flacher Beutel aus Stoff mit einer verstärkten Öffnung auf der Außenfläche; er wird an Schnüren befestigt an der Taille getragen.
扁平的小布袋，朝外表面具有縫邊的狹縫，懸掛於環腰而繫的帶子上。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; pockets

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
